display.purpose: Hero headings on login and home pages only.

headline.purpose: Page titles and section headers within cards.

title.purpose: Card titles, modal headers, playlist names.

shadows.name: ambient
shadows.purpose: Modal overlay depth (backdrop-blur-sm is preferred for surface separation). Used minimally.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary call-to-action. Green gradient background, white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(to right, #4ade80, #16a34a); color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease; line-height: 1.5; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: linear-gradient(to right, #22c55e, #15803d); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(74,222,128,0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action. Ghost-like with subtle border.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: rgba(31,41,55,0.5); color: #9ca3af; border: 1px solid rgba(75,85,99,0.5); border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease; line-height: 1.5; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(55,65,81,0.5); color: #e5e7eb; border-color: rgba(107,114,128,0.5); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(107,114,128,0.3); } .ds-btn-secondary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Lowest emphasis button — used for game answer choices.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #d1d5db; border: 2px solid rgba(75,85,99,0.5); border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 16px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease; line-height: 1.5; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; width: 100%; text-align: left; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: rgba(74,222,128,0.5); background: rgba(55,65,81,0.5); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(74,222,128,0.3); } .ds-btn-ghost:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; } .ds-badge { width: 28px; height: 28px; background: rgba(75,85,99,0.5); border-radius: 9999px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; color: #d1d5db; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-label { flex: 1; min-width: 0; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Default text field. Dark surface with subtle border.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: rgba(55,65,81,0.5); color: #fff; border: 1px solid rgba(75,85,99,0.8); border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 16px; font-size: 1rem; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; line-height: 1.5; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6b7280; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #4ade80; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(74,222,128,0.2); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Modal
components.html:
Settings

Modal content here.
components.css: .ds-modal-backdrop { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; z-index: 40; } .ds-modal { background: rgba(31,41,55,0.95); border: 1px solid rgba(55,65,81,0.5); border-radius: 16px; width: 100%; max-width: 448px; box-shadow: 0 25px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.25); animation: ds-modal-in 0.15s ease-out; } @keyframes ds-modal-in { from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.95); } to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); } } .ds-modal-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 24px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(55,65,81,0.5); } .ds-modal-title { margin: 0; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; } .ds-modal-close { background: none; border: none; color: #9ca3af; font-size: 1.5rem; cursor: pointer; padding: 0; line-height: 1; } .ds-modal-close:hover { color: #fff; } .ds-modal-body { padding: 24px; } .ds-modal-text { color: #9ca3af; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; }

components.name: Card
components.html:
Playlist Name

42 tracks
components.css: .ds-card { background: rgba(31,41,55,0.5); border: 1px solid rgba(55,65,81,0.5); border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; transition: border-color 0.2s ease; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: rgba(107,114,128,0.5); } .ds-card-icon { width: 56px; height: 56px; background: linear-gradient(to bottom right, #fbbf24, #ea580c); border-radius: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; color: #fff; } .ds-card-body { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: #fff; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-card-desc { margin: 4px 0 0; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #9ca3af; }

narrative.overview:
A shared room with dimmed lights, a good sound system, and friends gathered around music. The interface is a dark stage where the music preview is the spotlight and everything else recedes into the background. Surfaces are tonal layers rather than physical cards — depth comes from opacity and borders, not shadows — so nothing competes with the listening experience.

This system explicitly rejects cluttered, noisy game UIs. Every element answers one question: does it help players focus on the music and the guess? If it doesn't, it doesn't belong.
keyCharacteristics: Dark stage background (deep charcoal gradient) as a canvas for the music spotlight
Verdant glow accent — a lively, energized green inspired by Spotify's identity
Tonal layering instead of physical shadows — depth through opacity and borders
Clean rounded shapes (12–16px corners) that feel approachable, not aggressive
System sans-serif typography throughout — familiar, fast-loading, no friction

rules.name: The Stage Rule
rules.body: The body gradient is a dark room, not a decorative canvas. Every surface overlay is semi-transparent so the stage gradient stays visible. No solid gray-800 fills — always with transparency.

rules.name: The Accent Share Rule
rules.body: Verdant glow appears on at most 15% of any viewport. Its scarcity is what makes it read as interactive and alive. If a screen has two green elements that aren't the same interactive group, one of them is wrong.

rules.name: The System Stack Rule
rules.body: No custom webfonts. The system stack loads with the OS, needs no network request, and can't flash or flicker. Custom type would add latency and visual weight that contradicts the Jam Session's focus-forward ethos.

rules.name: The Flat-Confidence Rule
rules.body: No box shadows on surfaces at rest. A subtle backdrop blur is the ceiling for separation. Shadows imply physicality; this interface is a stage, not a desktop.

dos: Do use Verdant Glow sparingly — it's the accent, not the background.
Do use tonal layering (transparent surfaces + borders) instead of box shadows to create depth.
Do keep the body gradient visible through semi-transparent surface fills.
Do use system sans-serif stack for zero-loading typography.
Do use text-wrap: balance on headings, text-wrap: pretty on long prose.
Do let the music preview be the focal point — the UI should recede during gameplay.
donts: Don't use cluttered, noisy game UIs — the interface should never compete with the music.
Don't use box shadows on cards or containers at rest — depth comes from tonal layering.
Don't use decorative gradient text (background-clip: text on headings) — the one text-transparent on the home page greeting is a personalized flourish, not a pattern.
Don't use custom webfonts that add load time — the system stack is fast enough.
Don't use glassmorphism or backdrop blurs beyond the subtle modal overlay treatment.
Don't use side-stripe borders on cards — use full borders or nothing.
Don't stack multiple accent colors in a single view — one accent per surface.
Don't let placeholder text fall below 4.5:1 contrast against its background.
